atlas v0.5
Back To Use Cases

Use Case

Cultural Publishing / Editorial Front Page

适合文化出版、专题内容和杂志式首页。先做封面感，再做栏位和故事层级。

Primary Family

Magazine Editorial

Structures

Dossier / FeatureArchive Stack

Why This Fit Works

从任务反推视觉和结构

Content Shape

Lead story plus supporting stories, cover logic, editorial cadence.

User Goal

让用户先被主故事和主图像抓住，再愿意继续阅读更多内容。

Why

如果目标是让人读，而不是让人操作，用 dossier，而不是卡片堆满首页。

Avoid

  • 用 SaaS feature grid 讲文化内容
  • 过度 CTA 化
  • 图像太小

Recommended Families

这个场景最适合借哪几条家族

Web Family

Magazine Editorial

Feature-led publishing surfaces. The fold behaves like a cover or lead spread, not like a generic SaaS hero.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined LuxurySwiss / International Typographic Style

Best For

cultural publishingfeature homepagesbrand magazines
Open family
Web Family

Quiet Lifestyle Editorial

Calmer, slower, more collectible than classic magazine surfaces. The page feels like an issue, catalog, or taste-led brand world.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined Luxury

Best For

fashionlifestylecultural brands
Open family

Prompt Packet

可以直接复制给 agent 的场景提示

Prompt Packet

Cultural Publishing / Editorial Front Page

Content type: Cultural Publishing / Editorial Front Page IA layer: Dossier / Feature / Archive Stack Visual family: Magazine Editorial + Quiet Lifestyle Editorial Reference packet: Magazine Editorial / Quiet Lifestyle Editorial Mood: 适合文化出版、专题内容和杂志式首页。先做封面感，再做栏位和故事层级。 Required traits: 让用户先被主故事和主图像抓住，再愿意继续阅读更多内容。 Avoid: 用 SaaS feature grid 讲文化内容 / 过度 CTA 化 / 图像太小

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.

Updated 2026-03-30 · design.zondev.top
